description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with exaggerated, distorted features, particularly in the upper body and arms, which are stretched and angular, creating a dramatic, almost abstract silhouette. The figure's head is detailed, with visible facial features and medium-length hair, while the lower body appears more proportionate, with bent legs and crossed feet. The arms are raised and bent behind the head, contributing to the dynamic, expressive pose. The clothing consists of a long-sleeve top and fitted pants, with visible seams and folds, and the figure wears closed-toe shoes. The surface is smooth and matte, with a consistent, non-reflective finish. The overall form is highly stylized, with sharp, planar extensions radiating from the torso, giving the object a fragmented, sculptural appearance.
description: A highly stylized adult pedestrian with exaggerated, angular upper body and arms, detailed head, and crossed legs, wearing fitted clothing and closed-toe shoes. The figure's form is abstract, with sharp, planar extensions and a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, raised arms behind the head, and dramatic angular extensions radiating from the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sharp, planar distortions and the bent legs, with the head in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the arms' position, and the wide, angular spread of the upper body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the abstract, jagged extensions and the figure's posture.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve shirt and fitted pants with closed-toe shoes
attribute_posture: standing with arms raised behind head and legs crossed
